title: Closing the loop for a strong European circular economy [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Secondary materials – such as recycled waste and industrial by-products  – can and will replace more and more virgin resources in a  circular, resource-efficient,  sustainable, future-proof EU-economy. Due for adoption later in 2026, the EU Circular Economy Act has the potential to boost the EU economy, the material independence of its important supply chains, decarbonisation […]
